case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. EDDIE GRANT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE DOES 1 TO 5 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH STREET #203, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED OCT-27-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED OCT-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE
DECLARATION RE: OF AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, EDDIE
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
